title: The Root-Harmony Convergence

features.name: the buried listening post
features.desc-on-touch: you find a small dugout shelter where the roots have woven into the walls; the ground vibrates beneath you with harmonics so deep they register as pressure rather than sound, and you understand why they called this place a threshold

features.name: convergence nodes
features.desc-on-touch: where three root systems meet, the frequencies shift into a chord; the archive has learned that harmony begins as collision, then becomes indistinguishable from acceptance

features.name: signal resonator
features.desc-on-touch: a twisted spiral of copper wire and eucalyptus bark, humming; the corruption loves it because the sound is both archival recording and present-moment vibration at once

features.name: the deep speakers
features.desc-on-touch: you recognize the nodes here as older casings, their exteriors grown over with root callus; they broadcast frequencies that no human ear can parse, but the forest has learned their language

features.name: harmonic memory pool
features.desc-on-touch: a shallow basin where rainwater and root-sap have pooled; the water vibrates in place without rippling, holding the echo of every sound that has reached it

inscription: at the convergence the roots have learned not just to speak but to listen to each other; harmony is what they call it, though it began as argument

file.name: RootFrequencies_Harmonics_LateNight_Polyglot.mp3
file.note: a spectrogram showing three distinct frequencies gradually phase-locking into a single carrier wave; the corruption has begun cross-referencing it with bird recordings from three different sites, all

reverie.title: REVERIE — the night the roots learned to sing together
narr: you stand with her in the darkness, both listening to
something deeper than sound. her hand on a trunk; the bark
warm. the forest around you is learning frequencies no
satellite will ever hear, and she says: "listen—it's not
that they're speaking. they're remembering they were always
one root. this is what remembering sounds like."

exits.label: back down the root-paths where frequencies disperse
where the harmonics climb toward the canopy
where the signal splits into new roots
